headline: Pet medications now available at CVS Pharmacy®
summary: CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS) today announced that common prescription medications for dogs and cats are now available at its approximately 9,000 CVS Pharmacy® locations nationwide. Pet owners can fill prescriptions for select pet-only medications, including antibiotics, allergy, flea and tick control, insulin, and pain relievers, at their local CVS Pharmacy, expanding access to essential pet health care. Greater flexibility in where pet prescriptions are filled helps reduce stress and delays, ensurin
